## Infrastructure Stack

All layers live under `~/.stack/`. Read the entry-point doc for each layer you need:

- **Infrastructure:** `~/.stack/infra/infra.md` — server/app/repo registry, protocols, conventions
- **Project:** `~/.stack/symphony/` — planning, PR workflow, code review, Linear sync
- **Knowledge:** `~/.stack/knowledge/` — research context, architecture decisions, lessons learned
- **Transport:** `~/.stack/transport/` — remote execution via SSH, 16 MCP tools

Start with `~/.stack/infra/infra.md` for infrastructure context.
<!-- STACK_INJECT_END -->
